---
title: "standard-site-quarto — quick test"
format: html
---

## Full inline document

{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" >}}

## Card mode

{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" mode="card" >}}

## Publication feed

{{< standard-publication uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.publication/3mp6kwt3kmggd" limit="3" >}}
